item.name: List Class Sections By Academic Year

request.description: Returns periods grouped by day (Mon–Sat). Primary view for students and class teachers.
Returns all periods for the teacher across all class sections, grouped by day.
Creates all fee components for a standard in one call. All or nothing — no partial inserts.
Returns all fee components for a standard in the current academic year.
Generates fee records for ALL enrolled students in the class section based on the fee structure. Run once per term.
Returns total_due, total_paid, balance, and all fee records for a student. Primary view for the student fee dashboard.
Blocked if the record is already paid.

item.name: ⚠️ Error — Apply with end before start

exec: pm.test('Should return 400 — PENDING not a valid review outcome', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
pm.test('Should return 400 — cannot edit approved/rejected leave', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));

request.description: Returns student report card for a specific exam.

item.name: Report Card — All Exams in Academic Year

request.description: Omit exam_id to get results across all exams in the academic year.
Returns present/absent/late/leave counts and attendance percentage. Add from_date and to_date to scope the range.
Returns attendance for all enrolled students in July 2024.
Returns attendance for a single day.
Returns per-subject averages, highest/lowest marks, pass %, and top 5 student rankings.

item.name: Fee Collection Report — Full Academic Year

request.description: Returns total due, collected, balance, and waived across all standards.

item.name: Fee Collection Report — By Class Section

request.description: Returns attendance summary for all teachers in July 2024.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Class 10-A Parent-Teacher Meeting",
  "content": "A Parent-Teacher Meeting for Class 10 Section A is scheduled for 5th October at 10:00 AM in Room 204. Attendance is mandatory.",
  "audience": "PARENTS",
  "class_section_id": "{{class_section_id}}",
  "expires_at": "2025-10-06T00:00:00Z"
}

exec: pm.test('Should return 400 for invalid audience', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
pm.test('Should return 400 for past expiry', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
pm.test('Should return 400 — cannot edit published notice', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
pm.test('Should return 400 — cannot delete published notice', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
pm.test('Should return 400 — expires_at already passed', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
